app.title: Data Team Townhall 2025
app.subtitle: Vibe check the room 🎯
app.privacy_message: This poll is completely anonymous. No personal information is collected or stored anywhere. Your responses cannot be traced back to you in any way.
app.privacy_sub: This is purely for fun — to spark great conversations and good vibes in the room! 🎉
app.thank_you_message: Your answers are in! Sit back, relax, and watch the big screen. Let's see what the data team really thinks!
app.thank_you_sub: Results will be revealed live by your host. Stay tuned! 🍿
app.completed_on_refresh_message: You've answered all questions. Watch the big screen for the live reveal!
app.footer_note: Anonymous • No data stored • Just for fun

dashboard.title: Host Dashboard 🎛️
dashboard.subtitle: Data Team Townhall 2025
dashboard.locked_label: Tap to reveal for the room

questions.question: What is the most unpredictable thing in 2025?

quips.a: Well, at least we all agree on ONE thing in 2025 🛣️
quips.b: Even our own creations scare us now. That's growth! 🤖
quips.c: HODLers in the data team. Noted and respected 📈
quips.d: Can't model the monsoon, can't model the market ☂️

questions.question: What is the real prerequisite for launching your data agent?

quips.a: Sparky, Wibey, Datafy — the naming pattern is scientifically proven 😄
quips.b: We stan a pipeline that is authentically, genuinely flawed 🧠
quips.c: The 40-slide PPT IS the real product. Always has been 📋
quips.d: No chai, no deploy. This is company policy now ☕

options.text: Name must end in Y — Sparky, Wibey, Datafy!
It must hallucinate at least once in testing
Chai in hand at the moment of deployment

questions.question: If your data pipeline had a Bollywood personality, it would be?

quips.a: Devdas energy fully confirmed in this data team 😅
quips.b: Jugaad is our actual engineering philosophy. Own it 🧠
quips.c: Mogambo khush hua — and so did your on-call schedule 🕵️
quips.d: Always late, always wise. Classic senior engineer behaviour 🎭

questions.question: What does Agentic AI mean to your average stakeholder?

quips.a: Honestly same. We also just want it to work while we sleep 😴
quips.b: The budget slide is already being updated as we speak 💸
quips.c: The real agentic AI: approvals we made along the way 📝
quips.d: At least they're honest. Half the AI community is also figuring it out 😅

options.text: AI that works while I sleep
Something that needs more budget approval

questions.question: Your honest reaction when someone says 'just use AI for that'?

quips.a: Practical optimists. The rarest and most valuable species 🤔
quips.b: Data quality: the villain in every AI success story 🙄
quips.d: Diplomatic nods have powered more projects than any roadmap 😶

options.text: Have you seen our data quality?

questions.question: What fuels your best data decisions?

quips.a: Chai supremacy confirmed by the data team. This is peer-reviewed 🍵
quips.b: Coffee team standing firm, not taking questions ☕
quips.c: Ambidextrous caffeine strategy. Truly the mark of a senior IC 🔄
quips.d: Fear is a feature, not a bug. Deadline-driven architecture 😱

questions.question: How do you explain Prompt Engineering at a family dinner?

quips.a: Politeness to robots: our most underrated technical competency 🗣️
quips.b: Technically not wrong. And technically not right either 📝
quips.c: Acting coach for AI. Put that on your LinkedIn right now 🎭
quips.d: At least we're being honest about the situation 🔮

options.text: Talking very nicely to a robot
Dark arts we don't fully understand yet

questions.question: Most used phrase in your data team meetings?

quips.a: The eternal question. Older than any dashboard 📊
quips.b: We define the word definition differently here too 🤔
quips.c: Data quality: root cause of everything since 2009 🔴
quips.d: The most passive-aggressive phrase ever invented 😅

questions.question: If ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot and Claude were IPL teams, who wins 2025?

quips.a: The consistent opener. Nobody panic-switches to the OG 🏏
quips.b: Google money goes brrr. Strong infra, stronger marketing 💎
quips.c: Ships inside the IDE, gets the job done. The ultimate team player 🤝
quips.d: Thinks before every shot. Clearly our kind of people here 🤔

options.text: Gemini — strong middle order, Google money
Copilot — ultimate team player in Office

questions.question: What is the hardest part of working in a global data team?

quips.a: 9am for you is someone's midnight standup 🌍
quips.b: The KPI definition meeting about how to define KPIs 📐
quips.c: We have 47 dashboards to track this exact problem 🔄
quips.d: The email that could've been a Slack. The Slack that could've been silence 📧

options.text: Time zones eating your mornings alive
Too many tools, too little standardisation
The meeting that could have been an email
